/usr/bin/ar qc libamd.a CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd.f.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_1.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_2.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_aat.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_control.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_defaults.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_dump.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_info.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l1.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l2.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_aat.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_control.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_defaults.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_dump.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_info.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_order.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_post_tree.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_postorder.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_preprocess.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_l_valid.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_order.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_post_tree.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_postorder.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_preprocess.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_valid.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amd_version.c.o CMakeFiles/AMD_static.dir/Source/amdbar.f.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libamd.a
